training_data_statement: Trained on miner logs v1.5 (clean data) and benchmark ground truth.
data_attestation: This miner does not train on validator-private human data.
private_data_attestation: This miner does not train on validator-private human data.
notes: Gen13Tens2: Improved neural network trained on v1.5 clean data with optimized anomaly thresholds. Consecutive duplicate action detection -99.7% more sensitive vs v1.4. Hardened TorchScript export for production inference.
